creator: Eduardo Morales

I learned how to develop the model view controller architecture in both Java Enterprise and that net. In addition to fully-contacting, the Apache server MIND SQL, database and the current MariaDB with SAM. Besides programming, I also like photography because I like a few moments that can't cause sensations in the hardware, which is something that interests me to take to the range of web design. creator: Tomislav Pajtak
transcript: Good day all. My name is Tomislav Pytak, but feel free to call me Tom. I'm from Croatia with over 15 years of experience working on board cruise ships with many different nationalities, where English language is the mandatory language for all as a main way of communication. I'm also Tefel certified teaching English as a foreign language. And also I have Star Center instructor certificate as well, which makes me a pretty good person to teach English online for all new learners. Besides the certificate I have managerial experience working with different nationalities on board, travelling the world. I'll be more than happy to share my experience with you. I'm willing to teach young, elderly and everyone in between, as long as you have positive attitudes and desire to learn will go a long way. Thank you for your time and hopefully I'll see you soon. Okay, bye now.

creator: Ali
transcript: Hi, my name is Ali and I'm 16 years old. I live in Sweden. Currently I'm a student at Stockholm Science Innovation School.
